name: Braune Zucker Platzchen (Brown Sugar Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs, milk, and orange rind.
3. Stir together the baking powder, spices, salt, and flour.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the sugar mixture.
5. Stir in the raisins and chopped nuts (if using).
6. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 10 to 12 minutes, or until done.
8. Remove from baking sheets and cool cookies on wire racks.
9. Store in airtight tins. Makes about 4 to 5 dozen cookies.
